name: MILLS MUSIC TRUST
summary: Mills Music Trust was created in 1964 to acquire the right to receive a deferred contingent purchase price obligation from Mills Music, Inc. following the sale of its music and lyric copyright catalogue of over 12,000 titles. The Trust receives quarterly royalty-based payments from EMI Mills Music Inc., administered by Sony/ATV Music Publishing LLC, and distributes proceeds to Unit Holders after expenses. The Trust conducts no other business activities.

products.name: Trust Units
products.description: Certificates representing interests in the Trust entitling Unit Holders to distributions from contingent portion payments received from EMI.

partnerships.description: EMI pays quarterly contingent portion payments to the Trust based on royalties generated by the music copyright catalogue.
Sony/ATV serves as administrator and manager of EMI and the music copyright catalogue.
Serves as Corporate Trustee of Mills Music Trust.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
